title: A resolution honoring Mississippi's Gestational Age Act.
stage_label: Referred to the Committee on the Judiciary. (text: CR S302-303)
crs_summary: This resolution expresses gratitude to Mississippi State Representative Becky Currie for introducing the state legislation prohibiting abortion after 15 weeks that resulted in the U.S. Supreme Court’s Dobbs v. Jackson Women’s Health Organization decision overturning Roe v. Wade and Planned Parenthood of Southeastern Pennsylvania v. Casey .
last_action_text: Referred to the Committee on the Judiciary. (text: CR S302-303)
